messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0027",
  "title": "典型移动游戏产品案例分析：《燕云十六声》",
  "page_index": 30,
  "page_range": "30"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0028",
    "title": "以独特历史切口形成独特市场定位 从备受质疑到全球破圈的逆袭之路",
    "page_range": "30-31",
    "summary": "**Topics:** Game market positioning strategy, player reception evolution, global expansion performance, cross-cultural appeal of historical wuxia titles, post-launch turnaround case study.\n**Entities:** 《燕云十六声》 (game), 网易 (NetEase), 点点数据 (DianDian Data), Steam, App Store.\n**Dates & Timeframes:** Historical setting: Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms to early Song dynasty; Global version launch: November 2025; Performance tracking & charts: Calendar year 2025.\n**Definitions/Concepts:** Realistic-style wuxia open-world game; \"Single-player + Multiplayer\" hybrid mode; Differentiated market positioning; Cross-cultural barrier penetration.\n**Claims:** The game's highly specific historical wuxia positioning initially faced market skepticism and polarized reviews (praised for visuals/history/immersion, criticized for combat feel/system design/mode maturity). Post-public beta content polishing triggered a rapid reversal in both data and reputation, demonstrating that high-quality differentiated positioning can achieve global breakout success and transcend cultural boundaries.\n**Metrics & Data Points:** Player milestones: 15M, 30M, 40M; Peak concurrent users: >250,000; Steam positive rating: >89%; App Store #1 free chart in >60 markets; Identified as one of NetEase's fastest-growing recent products.\n**Tables/Figures:** Two 2025 China App Store-only trend charts: (1) Monthly revenue (unit: 10,000 RMB), (2) Daily active users (unit: 10,000). Data source: DianDian Data.\n**Evidence Types:** Qualitative community/critical sentiment analysis; Quantitative performance benchmarks (player counts, CCU, ratings, regional chart rankings); Referenced time-series charts for revenue and DAU; Third-party market research attribution.\n**Retrieval Utility:** Answers queries regarding the game's hist..."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0029",
    "title": "在商业模式、玩法创新、体验纯粹性上的取舍与代价",
    "page_range": "31",
    "summary": "This parent section (pages 31–32) establishes a high-level framework for analyzing strategic trade-offs and associated costs across three core dimensions: business models, gameplay innovation, and user experience purity. It is structured around three subtopics: the conceptual balance of \"restraint\" versus \"radicalism\" in business models, the thematic categorization of \"dangerous fusion\" in gameplay design, and an experience-first strategy characterized by \"bold abandonment.\" The provided excerpts contain only section headings and a copyright notice (Entity: DianDian; Date: 2026). No definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types are visible. For retrieval purposes, this node functions strictly as a structural and topical marker; substantive answers regarding specific strategies, operational steps, analytical claims, or supporting data will require content from the full document sections."
  }
]

message.content:
**Topics:** Case study analysis of the mobile game 《燕云十六声》, covering market positioning strategy, player reception evolution, global expansion performance, cross-cultural appeal of historical wuxia titles, post-launch turnaround dynamics, and strategic trade-offs across business models, gameplay innovation, and user experience purity.
**Entities:** 《燕云十六声》, 网易 (NetEase), 点点数据 (DianDian Data), Steam, App Store.
**Dates & Timeframes:** Historical setting: Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms to early Song dynasty; Global version launch: November 2025; Performance tracking: Calendar year 2025; Document copyright: 2026.
**Definitions/Concepts:** Realistic-style wuxia open-world game; "Single-player + Multiplayer" hybrid mode; differentiated market positioning; cross-cultural barrier penetration; strategic frameworks of "restraint vs. radicalism" (business models), "dangerous fusion" (gameplay design), and "bold abandonment" (experience-first strategy).
**Claims:** The game's highly specific historical wuxia positioning initially faced market skepticism and polarized reviews but achieved a rapid post-beta reversal in data and reputation, demonstrating that high-quality differentiated positioning can drive global breakout success. The section also establishes a conceptual framework for analyzing the strategic costs and trade-offs inherent in balancing monetization, innovation, and experience purity.
**Metrics & Data Points:** Player milestones: 15M, 30M, 40M; Peak concurrent users: >250,000; Steam positive rating: >89%; App Store #1 free chart in >60 markets; identified as one of NetEase's fastest-growing recent products.
**Tables/Figures:** Two 2025 China App Store-only trend charts sourced from DianDian Data: (1) Monthly revenue (unit: 10,000 RMB), (2) Daily active users (unit: 10,000).
**Procedures/Structural Notes:** The section functions primarily as a high-level analytical framework and structural marker for strategic trade-offs. Substantive operational steps, detailed analytical claims, and supporting data for the business model, gameplay, and experience purity dimensions are indicated by section headings but require full document content for retrieval.
**Evidence Types:** Qualitative community/critical sentiment analysis; quantitative performance benchmarks (player counts, CCU, ratings, regional chart rankings); referenced time-series charts for revenue and DAU; third-party market research attribution.
**Retrieval Utility:** Supports queries on the market positioning, launch performance, player reception trajectory, and strategic design trade-offs of 《燕云十六声》, as well as data-driven case studies on cross-cultural wuxia game expansion and post-launch turnaround metrics.

response_text:
**Topics:** Case study analysis of the mobile game 《燕云十六声》, covering market positioning strategy, player reception evolution, global expansion performance, cross-cultural appeal of historical wuxia titles, post-launch turnaround dynamics, and strategic trade-offs across business models, gameplay innovation, and user experience purity.
**Entities:** 《燕云十六声》, 网易 (NetEase), 点点数据 (DianDian Data), Steam, App Store.
**Dates & Timeframes:** Historical setting: Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms to early Song dynasty; Global version launch: November 2025; Performance tracking: Calendar year 2025; Document copyright: 2026.
**Definitions/Concepts:** Realistic-style wuxia open-world game; "Single-player + Multiplayer" hybrid mode; differentiated market positioning; cross-cultural barrier penetration; strategic frameworks of "restraint vs. radicalism" (business models), "dangerous fusion" (gameplay design), and "bold abandonment" (experience-first strategy).
**Claims:** The game's highly specific historical wuxia positioning initially faced market skepticism and polarized reviews but achieved a rapid post-beta reversal in data and reputation, demonstrating that high-quality differentiated positioning can drive global breakout success. The section also establishes a conceptual framework for analyzing the strategic costs and trade-offs inherent in balancing monetization, innovation, and experience purity.
**Metrics & Data Points:** Player milestones: 15M, 30M, 40M; Peak concurrent users: >250,000; Steam positive rating: >89%; App Store #1 free chart in >60 markets; identified as one of NetEase's fastest-growing recent products.
**Tables/Figures:** Two 2025 China App Store-only trend charts sourced from DianDian Data: (1) Monthly revenue (unit: 10,000 RMB), (2) Daily active users (unit: 10,000).
**Procedures/Structural Notes:** The section functions primarily as a high-level analytical framework and structural marker for strategic trade-offs. Substantive operational steps, detailed analytical claims, and supporting data for the business model, gameplay, and experience purity dimensions are indicated by section headings but require full document content for retrieval.
**Evidence Types:** Qualitative community/critical sentiment analysis; quantitative performance benchmarks (player counts, CCU, ratings, regional chart rankings); referenced time-series charts for revenue and DAU; third-party market research attribution.
**Retrieval Utility:** Supports queries on the market positioning, launch performance, player reception trajectory, and strategic design trade-offs of 《燕云十六声》, as well as data-driven case studies on cross-cultural wuxia game expansion and post-launch turnaround metrics.
